brand_city_daily_completed_orders.description: 查询某品牌在某自然日、按城市汇总的完单量。
brand_city_daily_completed_orders.grain_note: honghu_order_data 可能按城市、流量渠道、订单类型等多行存储；同一城市必须 SUM(completed_order_count)，不能 COUNT(*)。
brand_city_daily_completed_orders.use_when: 用户询问品牌在某天、按城市、品牌或总计维度的离线订单完单量。
do_not_use_when: 用户明确要求实时累计数据
用户只给出租户名称且未确认品牌映射
用户要求乘客、司机、订单明细级隐私数据
brand_city_daily_completed_orders.query_template: SELECT city_name, SUM(completed_order_count) AS completed_order_count FROM honghu_order_data WHERE brand_name = '{brand_name}' AND date_day = '{date_day}' GROUP BY city_name ORDER BY completed_order_count DESC LIMIT {limit}

verification_queries.name: total_completed_order_count
verification_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(completed_order_count) AS total_completed_order_count, COUNT(*) AS source_row_count, COUNT(DISTINCT city_name) AS city_count FROM honghu_order_data WHERE brand_name = '{brand_name}' AND date_day = '{date_day}' LIMIT 1

verification_queries.name: city_sum_completed_order_count
verification_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(city_completed_order_count) AS city_sum_completed_order_count FROM (SELECT city_name, SUM(completed_order_count) AS city_completed_order_count FROM honghu_order_data WHERE brand_name = '{brand_name}' AND date_day = '{date_day}' GROUP BY city_name) t LIMIT 1

brand_daily_completed_orders.description: 查询某品牌在某自然日的离线完单总量。
brand_daily_completed_orders.query_template: SELECT SUM(completed_order_count) AS total_completed_order_count FROM honghu_order_data WHERE brand_name = '{brand_name}' AND date_day = '{date_day}' LIMIT 1

verification_queries.name: source_row_count
verification_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS source_row_count, COUNT(DISTINCT city_name) AS city_count FROM honghu_order_data WHERE brand_name = '{brand_name}' AND date_day = '{date_day}' LIMIT 1

tenant_daily_realtime_completed_orders.display_name: 租户实时累计日完单数
tenant_daily_realtime_completed_orders.description: 查询某租户在某日期的实时累计订单完单数。
tenant_daily_realtime_completed_orders.use_when: 用户明确要求实时累计，或查询对象是租户名称。
do_not_use_when: 用户要求某品牌各城市完单量且未确认品牌和租户映射
用户要求离线订单口径
tenant_daily_realtime_completed_orders.query_template: SELECT tenant_name, SUM(cal_6bb0fc3c10) AS completed_order_count FROM order_real_time_data WHERE tenant_name = '{tenant_name}' AND datae_column_b4276e28f8_day_real = '{date_day}' GROUP BY tenant_name LIMIT {limit}

verification_queries.name: source_row_count
verification_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS source_row_count FROM order_real_time_data WHERE tenant_name = '{tenant_name}' AND datae_column_b4276e28f8_day_real = '{date_day}' LIMIT 1

operator_brand_mapping.display_name: 运营主体品牌城市码表
operator_brand_mapping.description: 查询运营主体、品牌、城市、对接人映射关系。
operator_brand_mapping.query_template: SELECT operator_entity, brand_name, city_name, contact_person FROM operator_brand WHERE {conditions} ORDER BY operator_entity, brand_name, city_name LIMIT {limit}
